visuals.title: The Agent-Environment Interaction Loop
visuals.description: Visual diagram for The Agent-Environment Interaction Loop
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Agents and Environment</text>
  
  <!-- Environment Box -->
  <rect x="60" y="60" width="300" height="200" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" rx="8" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Environment
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Agent 1 -->
  <rect x="120" y="120" width="80" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="160" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Agent 1
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Agent 2 -->
  <rect x="220" y="120" width="80" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="260" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Agent 2
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Sensor Inputs -->
  <path d="M90 140 L120 140" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <text x="105" y="130" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Sensors
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Actuator Outputs -->
  <path d="M200 140 L170 140" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <text x="185" y="130" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Actuators
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Agent Interaction -->
  <path d="M200 160 L220 160" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <text x="210" y="150" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Interaction
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrowhead marker definition -->
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
        <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
      </polygon>
    </marker>
  </defs>
</svg>

diagrams.title: Structure of a Model-Based Reflex Agent
